Notes: CSP goes on 6-0 run in final 55 seconds to win the game..CSP goes 8:14 in the
second half without a point...Amanda Behnke records sixth double-double of the
season with 18 points and 13 rebounds..Tori Fink scores career-high 17 points
Game.Officials: Dave Peterson,  Darin Berg,  Keith Kusler
